scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix backend/user-service && npm install --prefix backend/restaurant-service && npm install --prefix backend/order-service && npm install --prefix backend/delivery-service && npm install --prefix frontend/react-app
scripts.start-all: concurrently "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-user" "npm run start-restaurant" "npm run start-order" "npm run start-delivery" "npm run start-frontend"
scripts.dev-all: concurrently "npm run dev-gateway" "npm run dev-user" "npm run dev-restaurant" "npm run dev-order" "npm run dev-delivery" "npm run dev-frontend"
